AI-Generated Insights

Traffic Spike Detected

Your /products page saw a 45% increase in traffic on January 14th, likely due to the newsletter campaign launched that morning.

Mobile Conversion Opportunity

Mobile users have a 23% lower conversion rate than desktop. Consider optimizing your checkout flow for smaller screens.

Peak Hours Analysis

Your highest engagement occurs between 10 AM and 2 PM UTC. Schedule important announcements during this window.
